form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora, at the bell was 7th-11.7 beaten 10 m by Letstacoboutit (2:01.50) in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $6.50. Before that, 8th (Fr3) over 1760m after showing early pace at Junee beaten 30 m by Kalkadoon Dreaming (2:10.70) in NR 42 to 45 on February 24 at $5. Rates highly and should get every chance from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.
Checked passing the 500m as a result of Illustration giving ground.
Checked passing the 1300m as a result of Dusty Muster giving ground.

form.formComment: Easy win three starts back at Junee over 1760m NR 36 to 39 on March 17. Last start 9th (Fr2) over 1740m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, beaten 30 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $34. Well drawn so can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Easy win three starts back at Junee over 1760m NR 36 to 39 on March 17. Last start 9th (Fr2) over 1740m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, beaten 30 m by Feelgood Ray (2:04.90) in NR up to 47 on April 4 at $34. Well drawn so can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Paddy Mach near the 400m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Magic Matteo at Junee over 1760m in a NR 41 to 46 on March 17 at $101. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind One Stunin Melody at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $7. Forward performance expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Magic Matteo at Junee over 1760m in a NR 41 to 46 on March 17 at $101. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind One Stunin Melody at Junee over 1760m in a 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $7. Forward performance expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked passing the 1500m when Stipulating broke gait.
Locked wheels with The Burrum Fox near the 600m and inconvenienced.
Inconvenienced as a result of French Street breaking gait.
Contacted marker pegs on final turn.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Kristysgirl at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on March 27 at $34. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Feelgood Ray at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on April 4 at $23. Top contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Kristysgirl at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on March 27 at $34. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Feelgood Ray at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on April 4 at $23. Top contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked from behind the tiring Arklow near the 600m.

form.formComment: Last start game effort when 3rd (Fr1) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee was 3rd-4.6 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Letsgo Matilda (2:11.50) in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $5. Two runs back tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; posted a big 4.5 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:12.00) beating Glamors Symbol in NR up to 33 on March 10 at $2.60 at the bell was 2nd-2.7. Capable of playing a major role.

Capable of playing a major role.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing seventh after being driven well back, behind Kristysgirl at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on March 27 at $51. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Feelgood Ray at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on April 4 at $18. Can be in the finish again.

Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Feelgood Ray at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on April 4 at $18. Can be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing second behind Letsgo Matilda at Junee over 1760m in a NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $51. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Letstacoboutit at Temora over 1635m in a NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $31. Racing well and expected to be competitive.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Letstacoboutit at Temora over 1635m in a NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $31. Racing well and expected to be competitive.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly under pressure near the 200m.

form.formComment: Last start by a head when quickly away, (Fr2) at Temora (2:02.00) beating Spread The Fear in NR up to 33 on April 6 at $11 at the bell was leading 0.9. Must respect off the last-start win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a head when quickly away, (Fr2) at Temora (2:02.00) beating Spread The Fear in NR up to 33 on April 6 at $11 at the bell was leading 0.9. Must respect off the last-start win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dropped its near-side knee boot during the middle stages of the race.
Near side sulky wheel deflated inside the final 150m.
